notes: This batch groups the three mega_sims diagnostic scripts as one bounded stochastic diagnostic strip.
prove_foundation.py was read only as the next proof-family boundary and is not a source member here.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch

comparison_anchors.relevance: Provides continuity from the prior residual result-only pass and records the explicit shift into diagnostics.
Shows the closure-audit classification of the remaining diagnostic/proof strip.
Provides the deterministic proof boundary that stays separate from the mega stochastic strip.
Shows zero catalog visibility for the mega strip.
Shows zero top-level evidence-pack visibility for the mega strip.

runtime_expectations: mega_sims_failure_detector.py would evaluate 4096 one-qubit pure states for 5000 random-unitary steps and emit MS_TRIVIAL_DETECT only if its boolean flag remains true.
mega_sims_trivial_check.py would evaluate the same 4096-state 5000-step lattice and emit MS_TRIVIAL_CHECK only if its stricter boolean all-purity threshold remains true.
mega_sims_run_02.py would emit four always-signaled local surfaces: MS_B_AXIS6 at 8192x2000, MS_C_AXIS3 at 8192x2000, MS_D_OPCHAOS at 16384x2000, and MS_E_LONGRUN at 4096x10000.
All three scripts emit local stdout evidence only and do not write committed simson result surfaces.
The next residual work begins at prove_foundation.py as a separate proof family.
failure_modes: Collapsing the two boolean detectors into one identical surface and losing the duplicated-token seam.
Treating mega_sims_run_02.py as a fundamentally different sim family rather than a scaled diagnostic variant.
Reading collapse as a live metric even though it is never updated in source.
Failing to mark the purity-preservation conclusion as a source-based inference rather than a runtime observation.
Merging prove_foundation.py into the mega strip just because it also emits SIM_EVIDENCE v1.

sims_split_rule.notes: This batch remains inside the separate sims source class and does not mix with ordinary theory/doc extraction.
